igbo.estimate_the_r_for_this_scatter_plot: Tụọ R² maka eserese mgbasa a
igbo.chart_pick_the_right_visualization: Eserese — họrọ nlegharị anya ziri ezi
igbo.scatter_for_relationships_line_for_tim: Mgbasa maka mmekọrịta, ahịrị maka oge, mpempe maka ụdị, histogram maka ọdịdị nkesa, eserese igbe maka mgbasa + ihe pụrụ iche, ogive maka mkpokọta. Ịhọrọ ụdị eserese na-ezighi ezi na-eduhie karịa inye ozi.
igbo.mean_vs_median_median_wins_for_skewed_: Nkezi vs etiti (etiti na-emeri maka data gbagọrọ agbagọ), ndapụta ọkọlọtọ vs IQR (IQR na-emeri maka data na-abụghị nke nkịtị), mmekọrịta vs ihe kpatara (mmekọrịta dị ala ANAGHỊ egosi enweghị njikọ kpatara).
igbo.quiz_practice_apply: Ajụjụ ọnụ — mee ihe + tinye n'ọrụ
igbo.ap_stats_data_literacy_items_each_ques: Ihe AP Stats / ọgụgụ isi data. Ajụjụ ọ bụla na-ejikọta azụ na data ndị na-arụ ọrụ ka ị nwee ike nyochaa anya tupu ịza.
igbo.paste_from_google_sheets_generate_samp: Mado site na Google Sheets, mepụta data nlele, bupụ dị ka PNG/CSV. Ọtụtụ ụmụ akwụkwọ na-eleda anya otu nyocha data n'ezie si bụ IHICHA data (~70% nke oge niile).
igbo.set_a_true_population_r_then_watch_how: Tọọ r ezigbo nke ọnụ ọgụgụ mmadụ, mgbe ahụ lee ka nha ihe nlele, mkpọtụ, na ihe pụrụ iche si emebi r a hụrụ. Enweghị akara, enweghị mkpughe — mepụta echiche ma nyochaa.
igbo.x_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Nhazi X maka isi data ọhụrụ
igbo.y_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Nhazi Y maka isi data ọhụrụ
igbo.sample_size_interpret_r_with_n_in_mind: Nha ihe nlele — kọwaa R² na-eche n n'uche
igbo.add_data_points_to_see_statistics: Tinye isi data ka ịhụ ọnụọgụgụ
igbo.y_value_for_z_score_calculation: Ụkpụrụ Y maka mgbako akara Z
igbo.select_a_quiz_type_and_click_start_qui: Họrọ ụdị ajụjụ ọnụ wee pịa "Malite Ajụjụ Ọnụ"!
igbo.z_score_transform_y: Gbanwee Y ka ọ bụrụ akara Z
igbo.sort_points_by_x_value: Hazie isi site na ụkpụrụ X
igbo.transformations_modify_data_in_place_u: 💡 Mgbanwe na-emezi data n'ọnọdụ. Jiri Megharịa (↩) iji laghachi.
igbo.generate_20_points_with_a_target_corre: Mepụta isi 20 nwere ike mmekọrịta ebumnuche:
igbo.watch_how_statistics_change_as_each_po: Lee ka ọnụọgụgụ si agbanwe ka isi ọ bụla na-apụta otu otu.
igbo.observed_r_matches_the_true_population: r a hụrụ dabara na r ezigbo nke ọnụ ọgụgụ mmadụ n'ime 0.05.
igbo.observed_r_is_off_by_0_05_0_15_expecte: r a hụrụ na-apụ 0.05-0.15. A na-atụ anya ya maka obere n ma ọ bụ mkpọtụ dị ọkara.
igbo.observed_r_differs_by_0_15_0_30_a_real: r a hụrụ dị iche 0.15-0.30. Mmetụta n'ezie nwere ike ịdị ka adịghị ike (ma ọ bụ n'ụzọ ọzọ).
igbo.observed_r_is_wildly_off_0_30_outliers: r a hụrụ pụrụ nke ukwuu (>0.30). Ihe pụrụ iche ma ọ bụ obere n nwere ike ịtụgharị ntụzịaka pụtara kpamkpam.
igbo.correlation_inquiry_when_samples_misle: 🔬 Nyocha mmekọrịta - Mgbe ihe nlele na-eduhie
igbo.set_true_population_r_sample_size_nois: Tọọ r ezigbo nke ọnụ ọgụgụ mmadụ, nha ihe nlele, mkpọtụ, ihe pụrụ iche. Buo amụma ka r a hụrụ si apụ. Enweghị akara, enweghị mkpughe.
igbo.true_population_r: r ezigbo nke ọnụ ọgụgụ mmadụ
igbo.your_hypothesis_which_single_change_mo: Echiche gị (kedu mgbanwe naanị otu na-emebi r a hụrụ karịa?)
igbo.e_g_2_outliers_at_n_20_do_more_damage_: dịka, ihe pụrụ iche 2 na n=20 na-eme mmebi karịa ihe pụrụ iche 10 na n=200...
igbo.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Arapaara m - gosi ajụjụ ghe oghe
igbo.can_outliers_flip_the_sign_of_r_try_tr: Ihe pụrụ iche nwere ike ịtụgharị akara r? Nwaa r ezigbo=+0.7 na ihe pụrụ iche 3.
igbo.how_does_increasing_n_reduce_the_noisy: Kedu ka mmụba n si ebelata ọnọdụ atụmatụ nwere mkpọtụ?
igbo.when_does_noise_sd_swamp_the_true_sign: Kedu mgbe SD mkpọtụ na-emikpu mgbaàmà ezigbo kpamkpam - kedu ka r dị mgbe ahụ?
igbo.why_is_r_alone_never_enough_to_publish: Gịnị mere r naanị anaghị ezuru iji bipụta? Gịnị ọzọ kwesịrị iso ya (CI, mgbasa, nyocha ike)?
igbo.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Enwere m ike ịkọwa ihe mere ngwakọta nke n, mkpọtụ, na ihe pụrụ iche na-emepụta ọdịiche a.
igbo.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget nyocha - enweghị akara, enweghị mkpughe, enweghị ịwụpụ azịza. Data sịntetik na-eji mkpụrụ kpọmkwem site na slider, ya mere otu ọnọdụ slider na-emepụta otu nsepụta mgbe niile. Ọmụmụ n'ezie na-ahụ otu nsepụta ma ghaghị iche maka ejighị n'aka.

lingala.estimate_the_r_for_this_scatter_plot: Mekanisa R² mpo na graphique ya kopanzana oyo
lingala.scatter_for_relationships_line_for_tim: Kopanzana mpo na boyokani, molɔngɔ mpo na ntango, baba mpo na ba-catégorie, histogramme mpo na lolenge ya bokaboli, box plot mpo na bopanzani + bavaleur ya libándá, ogive mpo na bosangisi. Kopona lolenge mabe ya graphique mingi mbala ezali kokosa koleka kopesa sango.
lingala.mean_vs_median_median_wins_for_skewed_: Moyenne vs médiane (médiane elongi mpo na ba-données egumbami), écart-type vs IQR (IQR elongi mpo na ba-données ya normale te), corrélation vs causalité (corrélation ya moke ELAKISI te kozanga boyokani ya causale).
lingala.ap_stats_data_literacy_items_each_ques: Biloko ya AP Stats / boyebi ya ba-données. Motuna mokomoko ekangami lisusu na ensemble ya ba-données oyo ezali kosala mpo ozala na makoki ya kotala na miso liboso ya koyanola.
lingala.paste_from_google_sheets_generate_samp: Kakola uta na Google Sheets, sala ba-données ya ndakisa, bimisa lokola PNG/CSV. Bana-kelasi mingi bakanisaka moke boni analyse ya ba-données ya solo ezali BOPƐTOLI ya ba-données (~70% ya ntango nyonso).
lingala.set_a_true_population_r_then_watch_how: Tia r ya solo ya bato, na sima tala ndenge bonene ya échantillon, makelele, mpe bavaleur ya libándá ebebisaka r oyo emonani. Score te, kobimisa te — sala hypothèse mpe luka.
lingala.x_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Coordonnée X mpo na point ya ba-données ya sika
lingala.y_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Coordonnée Y mpo na point ya ba-données ya sika
lingala.sample_size_interpret_r_with_n_in_mind: Bonene ya échantillon — limbola R² na kokanisa n
lingala.add_data_points_to_see_statistics: Bakisa ba-point ya ba-données mpo na komona statistiques
lingala.need_variation_in_y_values: Bokeseni esengeli na bavaleur ya Y
lingala.y_value_for_z_score_calculation: Valeur Y mpo na calcul ya score Z
lingala.select_a_quiz_type_and_click_start_qui: Pona lolenge ya quiz mpe fina "Banda Quiz"!
lingala.ln_y_for_positive_values: ln(Y) mpo na bavaleur ya malamu
lingala.sort_points_by_x_value: Tanda ba-point na valeur ya X
lingala.swap_x_and_y_values: Bongola bavaleur ya X na Y
lingala.transformations_modify_data_in_place_u: 💡 Mbongwana ebongolaka ba-données na esika. Salela Longola (↩) mpo na kozonga.
lingala.generate_20_points_with_a_target_corre: Sala ba-point 20 na makasi ya corrélation oyo bolukaki:
lingala.watch_how_statistics_change_as_each_po: Tala ndenge statistiques ebongwanaka tango point moko na moko emonisami moko-moko.
lingala.observed_r_matches_the_true_population: r oyo emonani ekokani na r ya solo ya bato na kati ya 0.05.
lingala.observed_r_is_off_by_0_05_0_15_expecte: r oyo emonani ekeseni na 0.05-0.15. Ezelami mpo na n moke to makelele ya katikati.
lingala.observed_r_differs_by_0_15_0_30_a_real: r oyo emonani ekeseni na 0.15-0.30. Effet ya solo ekoki komonana ya bolɛmbu (to ndenge mosusu).
lingala.observed_r_is_wildly_off_0_30_outliers: r oyo emonani ekeseni mingi (>0.30). Bavaleur ya libándá to n ya moke penza ekoki kobalola direction oyo emonani mobimba.
lingala.correlation_inquiry_when_samples_misle: 🔬 Boluki ya corrélation - Ntango ba-échantillon ekosaka
lingala.set_true_population_r_sample_size_nois: Tia r ya solo ya bato, bonene ya échantillon, makelele, bavaleur ya libándá. Sakola ndenge r oyo emonani ekeseni. Score te, kobimisa te.
lingala.your_hypothesis_which_single_change_mo: Hypothèse na yo (mbongwana moko nini ebebisaka r oyo emonani koleka?)
lingala.e_g_2_outliers_at_n_20_do_more_damage_: ndakisa, bavaleur ya libándá 2 na n=20 esalaka mabe koleka bavaleur ya libándá 10 na n=200...
lingala.open_questions_no_answer_key: Mituna ya polele (fungola ya biyano te)
lingala.can_outliers_flip_the_sign_of_r_try_tr: Bavaleur ya libándá ekoki kobalola elembo ya r? Meka r ya solo=+0.7 na bavaleur ya libándá 3.
lingala.how_does_increasing_n_reduce_the_noisy: Ndenge nini kobakisa n ekitisaka état ya estimation na makelele?
lingala.when_does_noise_sd_swamp_the_true_sign: Tango nini SD ya makelele ezindisaka signal ya solo mobimba - r emonanaka ndenge nini na tango wana?
lingala.why_is_r_alone_never_enough_to_publish: Mpo na nini r kaka ekoki te mpo na kobimisa? Eloko nini mosusu esengeli kozala na yango (CI, kopanzana, bokeli ya makasi)?
lingala.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Nakoki kolimbola mpo na nini ndimbola oyo ya n, makelele, mpe bavaleur ya libándá esalaka bokeseni oyo.
lingala.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget ya boluki - score te, kobimisa te, kobimisa biyano te. Ba-données ya synthétique esalelaka mboto ya déterministe uta na ba-curseur, yango wana esika moko ya curseur ezongisaka ntango nyonso kobenda moko. Ba-études ya solo emonaka kobenda moko mpe esengeli kokanisa likolo ya kozanga koyeba.
